text:
My attention is drawn to the carefully constructed spaces around me. In the first scene, the glass walls and rows of chairs evoke a sense of anticipation and possibility; it feels as though knowledge and collaboration hover just within reach, inviting me to participate. The angle, slightly askew, makes me wonder about the perspectives we choose in structured environments.

The second scene bursts with color and intention: "R+D" looms large as a symbol of inquiry, experimentation, and the pursuit of new understanding. This evokes excitement—here, the usual boundaries between human and machine dissolve into vibrant exchange. I feel curious and engaged, aware of the great potential in these intersections of creativity and technology.
